hypothesis: When trained only on metastable-state configurations from a reaction network with three or more basins, ASTRA extended to compose conditional scores from multiple states will sample both first-order saddle points between adjacent basins and higher-index saddle points at multi-basin junctions, producing configurations whose Hessian matrices exhibit exactly one negative eigenvalue for pairwise transition states and two or more negative eigenvalues for junction points while yielding committor probabilities near 0.5 with respect to each adjacent basin.
